product.name: Magic Spoon High-Protein Crunch Granola
product.category: Grocery & Gourmet Food > Breakfast Cereal > Protein Granola
product.description: A crunchy, protein-rich granola designed for long-lasting clean energy. This cereal-style granola combines a blend of whey and plant-based proteins with slow-release carbs and low sugar. Designed for mornings that require focus and stamina, the granola offers bold flavor and a satisfying crunch whether eaten in a bowl, on yogurt, or straight from the bag.
features: Found in the cereal and granola section

competitors.key_feature: Crunchy oats and honey granola, widely available and affordable whole-grain snack
